originalText.description: The full original text from the user's input

correctedText.description: The full corrected version of the entire text

corrections.description: Individual corrections, each referencing a fragment of the original text. May span multiple sentences.

original.description: The problematic fragment from the original text (may span multiple sentences)

severity.description: error = grammatical mistake, improvement = awkward but not wrong, style = stylistic suggestion

overallFeedback.description: A brief overall assessment of the learner's text
